description: Monthly food assistance loaded onto an EBT card. NY has among the most generous SNAP eligibility in the country through Broad-Based Categorical Eligibility.

eligibility.notes: NY uses Broad-Based Categorical Eligibility (BBCE) with 200% FPL gross income test and no asset test. Net income must be at or below 100% FPL after deductions.

apply_in_person: Visit your local HRA office. Locations: https://www.nyc.gov/site/hra/locations/locations.page
how_to_apply: Apply online through ACCESS HRA, by phone at 718-557-1399, or in person at your local HRA office.
citation: 7 U.S.C. § 2014(c); 7 CFR § 273.9; 7 CFR 273.2(j)(2) (BBCE); NY Social Services Law § 95
